channel.title: Petty Court — Daily Internet Drama
channel.description: Two hosts react to the internet's pettiest revenge and drama, every day.
channel.itunes:author: Petty Court

item.title: Boomer Work, Boomer Problems: Grandpa's Farm vs. The Exposure Expedition
item.description: This week on Petty Court, Max and Ivy dissect a Reddit story about family drama, manual labor, and the true cost of 'exposure.' Get ready for some serious entitlement from r/AmItheAsshole.
